aggregation_note: Factors + micro_recall are pooled ratio-of-sums (the telescoping-identity frame; micro coverage_bank == the published rule-bank ceiling 0.735). macro_* are per-substrate means (metrics.py convention); macro_recall reproduces the deployed headline recall@15 0.330 (the earlier ~0.334 was a 291-substrate eval, now corrected).

provenance.deployed_output: generator.pt x filter.pt: generate(top_k=30, max_output=15, ranking_policy=rank, filter_candidate_cap=32)
